'''Wuioe Opca''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] who worked as a chef during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He was met by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] working for the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] place of work in the [[Labor Outpost]] on [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin's]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|fourth]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. The spacer was looking for information on [[Uff Wogo]] and Opca was more than happy to provide it. He informed the spacer that Uff had last been seen in [[Nashal]] on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and also let the spacer know that Uff was a heavy drinker, which led the spacer to look for him in [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]].<ref name="AED" />
